en_title: Marvel Legend Stan Lee to Be 'Resurrected' Through AI, With His Voice and Likeness Licensed for Commercial Use
cn_title: 漫威传奇斯坦·李将被AI「复活」，声音与形象授权商业使用

paragraphs.en: "Stan always believed in meeting his fans where they were."
paragraphs.cn: 「斯坦始终相信，要在粉丝所在的地方与他们见面。」
更新时间：2026年5月27日 18:05 UTC（北京时间5月28日凌晨2:05）

paragraphs.en: The late Marvel comics legend Stan Lee will have his voice and likeness replicated by an AI company for commercial use, it's been announced.
paragraphs.cn: 据宣布，已故漫威漫画传奇斯坦·李的声音与形象将被一家AI公司复刻，并用于商业用途。

paragraphs.en: AI audio company ElevenLabs has acquired the rights to Lee's image and voice and intends to license them for further use by other companies, opening the door to a digitally-resurrected Lee appearing in films and commercials.
paragraphs.cn: AI语音公司ElevenLabs已取得斯坦·李形象与声音的使用权，并计划将其授权给其他公司进一步使用，这意味着以数字方式「复活」的斯坦·李有望出现在电影和广告中。

paragraphs.en: ElevenLabs users will also be able to hear a replication of Lee's voice narrate audio books — including via a "Stan Lee Book Club of the Month" — and generate a comic book panel featuring Lee from templates that include his likeness.
paragraphs.cn: ElevenLabs的用户届时还可以听到模拟斯坦·李声音的有声书旁白——包括「斯坦·李每月读书会」——并能从含有他形象的模板中生成由斯坦·李出场的漫画分格。

paragraphs.en: "Stan always believed in meeting his fans where they were: in the pages of a comic, at a convention, or in a quick on-screen cameo," said Chaz Rainey, a lawyer and board member for Stan Lee Universe, the company that currently owns Lee's image, per Variety.
paragraphs.cn: 「斯坦始终相信，要在粉丝所在的地方与他们见面：无论是在漫画书页中、在漫展现场，还是在银幕上的短暂客串。」目前持有斯坦·李形象权益的Stan Lee Universe公司董事兼律师Chaz Rainey对《Variety》表示。

paragraphs.en: "This partnership is a way of continuing that. Fans have always told us that when they read his comics, they hear the words in Stan's voice, and now, thanks to ElevenLabs, we can make that a reality."
paragraphs.cn: 「这次合作正是这一理念的延续。粉丝一直告诉我们，他们在阅读斯坦的漫画时，脑海里听到的就是斯坦的声音；现在，借助ElevenLabs，我们可以让这一切成真。」

paragraphs.en: This isn't the first time that Lee's voice and image have been replicated using AI. Last year's Los Angeles Comic Con saw technology company Proto Hologram charge between $15 and $20 for a three-minute chat with Lee's AI likeness, to widespread disapproval from fans.
paragraphs.cn: 这并不是斯坦·李的声音与形象首次被AI复刻。去年在洛杉矶漫展上，科技公司Proto Hologram就曾以$15到$20（约人民币107至143元）的价格出售与斯坦·李AI形象3分钟的对话体验，引发粉丝普遍不满。

paragraphs.en: The legal rights to Lee's image remain a messy subject, with Stan Lee Universe now set up as a joint venture involving Lee's own company POW! Entertainment. Shortly before his death in 2018, however, Lee also attempted to sue POW! Entertainment, claiming the company's other chiefs conspired to "fraudulently steal" his name and likeness and benefit financially at his expense.
paragraphs.cn: 斯坦·李形象的法律权属至今仍是一团乱麻——目前Stan Lee Universe是与斯坦·李本人的公司POW! Entertainment联合成立的合资企业。不过，2018年斯坦·李去世前不久，他本人还曾试图起诉POW! Entertainment，声称公司其他高管合谋「以欺诈方式窃取」他的姓名与形象、从中牟利。

paragraphs.en: Lee was 95 at the time of this lawsuit, and by his own admission had suffered from advanced macular degeneration for several years, a condition that left him unable to read unaided.
paragraphs.cn: 提起诉讼时斯坦·李已95岁高龄，他本人承认自己多年来一直饱受重度黄斑变性困扰，导致无法独立阅读。

paragraphs.en: For ElevenLabs, Lee is just another voice added to its vault of living and deceased celebrities, which already includes Michael Caine, Matthew McConaughey, Judy Garland, David Hasselhoff and Albert Einstein. Caine previously said that ElevenLabs was "using innovation not to replace humanity, but to celebrate it... It's not about replacing voices; it's about amplifying them, opening doors for new storytellers everywhere." The company's technology was also used to bring the late James Earl Jones' Darth Vader to Fortnite as a chatty NPC.
paragraphs.cn: 对ElevenLabs而言，斯坦·李只是其在世与已故名人语音库中新增的一员。该语音库目前已收录迈克尔·凯恩、马修·麦康纳、朱迪·加兰、大卫·哈塞尔霍夫和爱因斯坦等人。迈克尔·凯恩此前曾表示，ElevenLabs「用创新不是为了取代人性，而是为了庆祝人性……这不是替代声音，而是放大声音，为各地的新讲述者打开大门」。该公司的技术此前也被用于将已故詹姆斯·厄尔·琼斯演绎的达斯·维达带入《堡垒之夜》，化身为爱聊天的NPC。
